title: Le Blocks Playroom
shortDesc: Supervised LEGO-style creative playroom inside Big C Chaweng and Tesco Lotus Lamai — kids build while parents shop next door.
description: Le Blocks is a real supervised kids playroom with two locations inside major Koh Samui supermarkets. Children build with LEGO-style bricks, create fuse bead art and work with foam clay in a clean, air-conditioned space. Staff supervised so parents can do grocery shopping in the same mall — one of the island's most convenient drop-off options. Walk-ins welcome. Add-on craft kits available.
priceNote: From 200 THB/hour per child. Adult supervision fee 100 THB. Craft kits 100–250 THB.

location.address: Big C Chaweng (first floor) & Tesco Lotus Lamai
